chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reasons for the Obligation of Zakat

text: 1581 - وَ قَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَنْ أَخْرَجَ زَكَاةَ مَالِهِ تَامَّةً فَوَضَعَهَا فِي مَوْضِعِهَا لَمْ يُسْأَلْ مِنْ أَيْنَ اِكْتَسَبَ مَالَهُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1581 - Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"Whoever pays the full Zakat on his wealth and allocates it properly will not be questioned about how he earned his wealth."
